en.headline: Mark discard package.
en.reason: This card is outside the strongest keep shell. Marking it for discard improves redraw quality around the current made rank group.
en.outcome: Marked 1/5 discard candidates; discard will resolve once the package is complete.

zh.headline: 标记 discard 组合。
zh.reason: 这张牌不属于最强的 keep shell。先把它标记进 discard，可以围绕当前 made rank group 提升 redraw 质量。
zh.outcome: 当前已标记 1/5 张 discard 目标；完成整包后就会执行 discard。

en.headline: Discard for redraw.
en.reason: The current best line is only Full House. With discards still available, redraw equity is worth more than forcing a low-value play.
en.outcome: Discard resolved; 2 Discards remain and the hand refilled to 8 cards.

zh.headline: 执行 discard 换牌。
zh.reason: 当前最好的出牌也只有 Full House。在还有 discards 的情况下，redraw equity 高于强行打出低价值手牌。
zh.outcome: discard 已结算；剩余 2 次 Discards，手牌已补回到 8 张。

zh.headline: 标记 discard 组合。
zh.reason: 这张牌不属于最强的 keep shell。先把它标记进 discard，可以围绕当前 made rank group 提升 redraw 质量。
zh.outcome: 当前已标记 1/5 张 discard 目标；完成整包后就会执行 discard。

en.headline: Mark discard package.
en.reason: This card is outside the strongest keep shell. Marking it for discard improves redraw quality around the current made rank group.
en.outcome: Marked 2/5 discard candidates; discard will resolve once the package is complete.

en.headline: Discard for redraw.
en.reason: The current best line is only Three of a Kind. With discards still available, redraw equity is worth more than forcing a low-value play.
en.outcome: Discard resolved; 1 Discards remain and the hand refilled to 8 cards.

zh.headline: 执行 discard 换牌。
zh.reason: 当前最好的出牌也只有 Three of a Kind。在还有 discards 的情况下，redraw equity 高于强行打出低价值手牌。
zh.outcome: discard 已结算；剩余 1 次 Discards，手牌已补回到 8 张。
